description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes a Docker image when code is pushed to master, feature branches, or tags matching v*, and on pull requests to master. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest job with permissions to read repository contents, write packages, attestations, and id tokens. It extracts metadata, sets up QEMU and Docker Buildx, logs in to the container registry, builds and pushes the Docker image, and generates artifact attestations.
